payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of an off-white to light-gray picture frame edge with a narrow, smooth molding and faint vertical banding; the object is edge-cropped and slightly blurred, appearing very close to the camera (approx. 0.3 m).

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"off-white frame edge, partial crop","long_description":"Partial close-up of an off-white to light-gray picture frame edge with a narrow, smooth molding and faint vertical banding; the object is edge-cropped and slightly blurred, appearing very close to the camera (approx. 0.3 m).","attributes":["off-white / light-gray finish","narrow vertical molding","smooth surface","slight gloss/reflection","faint vertical banding","edge-cropped (partial)","slightly blurred"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.3}
